steps.title: Identify key points on the line
steps.content: The line crosses the y-axis at (0, 3) and passes through (1, 0).

steps.title: Calculate slope and write the equation
steps.content:
Using the slope formula:

$$m = \frac{0 - 3}{1 - 0} = -3$$

With $m = -3$ and $b = 3$, the equation is:

$$y = -3x + 3$$

That matches choice B — B is correct.
